systemRoleImmutable: This is a system role and cannot be modified or deleted.
roleHasAssignedUsers: This role cannot be deleted while it is still assigned to users.
systemRolePermissionsImmutable: The permissions on a system role cannot be changed.
invalidPermissionCodes: One or more of the submitted permission codes do not exist.
cannotModifySelfRegistrationUser: This user has a self-registration role and cannot have their roles changed here.
notFound: The selected role does not exist.
alreadyAssigned: This user already has this role.
multipleNotAllowed: This user already has a role and this role does not allow multiple assignments.
userHasExclusiveRole: This user already has an exclusive role that cannot be combined with another.
assignmentNotFound: This role assignment does not exist for this user.
alreadyInactive: This role assignment is already inactive.
duplicatePermissionCodes: The submitted permission codes contain duplicates.
